theme_and_archetype.archetype: 2 - Performance Pro (Tactical Minimalism adapted for Brand)
theme_and_archetype.description: A high-contrast, focus-driven dark UI for a fitness app. Employs 'Tactical Elegance' by combining deep obsidian backgrounds with the user-requested Lilac (#8B7BB3) brand color. Designed to be highly legible in gym environments with large tap targets and a frictionless mobile-first experience.

brand.name: COELHO
brand.logo_concept: Purple/Lilac brand with black background and white details

typography.rules: Avoid Inter/generic sans for headings. Use Outfit for a modern athletic feel, Manrope for highly legible metrics and body text.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 for main cards. Keep touch targets at least 48px tall.
spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: Use bento-style grids for the workout category selection.
spacing_and_layout.bottom_nav: MANDATORY. Since this is a mobile web app, include a sticky bottom navigation bar with icons for Home, Treinos (Workouts), Histórico (History), and Perfil (Profile).

surface_strategies.cards: Flat solid background (#141414), 1px border (#27272A), completely square or very subtle rounded corners (rounded-md). No soft shadows.
surface_strategies.glassmorphism: Only used for the Bottom Nav and Modal overlays: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80 with a subtle border-t border-white/10.
surface_strategies.active_states: For active tabs or ongoing workout timers, use a subtle Lilac inner glow: drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(139,123,179,0.5)].

buttons.primary: bg-[#8B7BB3] hover:bg-[#A091C5] text-white font-semibold rounded-md py-3 px-6 transition-colors duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#27272A] text-white hover:border-[#8B7BB3] hover:text-[#8B7BB3] rounded-md py-3 px-6 transition-colors duration-200

components.inputs: Shadcn UI customized: bg-[#141414] border-[#27272A] focus:border-[#8B7BB3] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#8B7BB3] rounded-md text-white h-12.
components.timers: Circular progress rings. The track should be #27272A and the progress stroke must be Lilac (#8B7BB3) with an SVG filter for a glowing effect.
components.exercise_gifs: Since actual GIFs aren't dynamically loaded yet, use static workout images wrapped in an overflow-hidden container. Add a subtle 'Play' icon overlay to indicate it's a motion asset. Use aspect-video or aspect-square for consistency.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and borders transition to Lilac.
motion_and_interactions.modals: Slide up from the bottom (mobile drawer style) using Framer Motion or Shadcn Dialog tailored for mobile.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Provide text alternatives for GIFs and ensure contrast ratios (Lilac on Black is > 4.5:1).

media.instructions_to_main_agent: Use these images for workout categories and placeholder 'GIF' thumbnails. Ensure you apply a bg-black/40 overlay to images if text is placed on top of them.

hero_or_auth_bg.description: Dark gym equipment close up, great for the login screen background.

category_chest_arms.description: Man lifting weights, representing upper body exercises.

category_legs.description: Man on bench press, can be used for general strength/legs/core.

category_stretching.description: Person stretching, used for mobility or cool-down.

general_barbell.description: Barbell lifting in dimly lit gym.

pages_to_build.name: Auth / Login
pages_to_build.description: Simple screen with 'COELHO' brand. Black background, subtle equipment image with overlay, inputs for Email/Password, and a solid Lilac CTA button.

pages_to_build.name: Home / Dashboard
pages_to_build.description: Overview of the week. 'Iniciar Treino' (Start Workout) massive CTA card with Lilac glow. Recent workout history summary. Bottom Nav.

pages_to_build.name: Catálogo de Exercícios
pages_to_build.description: List or Grid of muscle groups (Peito, Costas, Pernas, Ombros, Braços, Abdômen). Tapping opens a list of exercises with GIF placeholders.

pages_to_build.name: Criar Treino Personalizado
pages_to_build.description: Form to name the workout and select exercises from the catalog. Displays selected exercises as a reorderable list.

pages_to_build.name: Treino Ativo (Session)
pages_to_build.description: The active workout interface. Shows current exercise, inputs for Weight and Reps, and a massive REST TIMER (Timer de Descanso) circular component that counts down.

testing_requirements.data_testid: MANDATORY. All buttons, navigation items, inputs, and form submissions must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='start-workout-cta').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind + raw HTML divs for custom layouts like the active workout session, to ensure maximum flexibility and precision.
Use Shadcn UI for standard inputs, dialogs (for the timer modal), and tabs.
Import Outfit and Manrope fonts from Google Fonts in index.css.
Install lucide-react for all iconography (Play, Pause, Dumbbell, History, User, etc.).
Ensure all text remains readable (WCAG AA) over dark backgrounds. Never use pure black text on dark surfaces.
For GIFs: Use standard `` tags pointing to placeholder images with a 'GIF' or 'Play' badge indicating they represent motion until actual data is hooked up.
